questions.question: Describe the main difference between packet switching and circuit switching. Provide an example of each type of switching.
questions.hint: Focus on the advantages and disadvantages of each

questions.question: Explain the different types of packet switching (store-and-forward, cut-through, virtual circuit) and their characteristics. Choose one type of packet switching as an example and explain its working.
questions.hint: Use a diagram to illustrate your explanation

questions.question: A network switch uses a routing table to forward packets. If the routing table is updated, which of the following packets would be affected?
questions.hint: Think about the packets that are currently being routed through the switch
